name: Story Init
description: Batch sync BMAD epics to GitHub — creates milestones labels and issues from epics.md. Run once to bootstrap or re-run when epics change.

name: Story Create
description: Sync GitHub state then run BMAD create-story workflow to plan the next story. Updates GitHub issue label to ready.

name: Story Dev
description: Create git worktree and branch then run BMAD dev-story workflow with auto-commits per task. Creates PR on completion.

name: Story Review
description: Run BMAD adversarial code review and push fixes. Does NOT mark story as done — the user merges the PR on GitHub.

name: Story Sync
description: Reconcile GitHub state with BMAD files. Detects merged PRs marks stories done and cleans up worktrees and branches.

name: Story Setup CI
description: Install the BMAD Story Sync GitHub Actions workflow into the current project. Automates marking stories done when issues close on GitHub.
